twitch_info.title: I wanna kill the kamilia 3 v2.02 - The Journey to 100% (Beaten K3 v1.50 100%)

message.body: Hola estas jugando needle difícil:)
I sure am LUL
had to use google translate, I don't speak other languages unfortunately!
Te gusta más el needle o el avoidance?
honestly hard to say, they're both good.
A mí me gusta el needle y gimmick y algún puzzle
fair enough! My favourite puzzle games are "Gaze at the Horizon" and "SlimePark"
Pero soy muy manco jugando no me paso ni un 80 de dificultad
I beat SlimePark without using any hints or guides. The only time I used help was for finding the secret stage entrances, but that was it.
@apoorautisticsoul ahhhh dang, I remember being like that
needle skill I think of myself as 70-80, but I can sometimes do some 90 stuff.
EX M-Stage is going to be rough
Llevo 6 años jugando y me he pasado pantallas por encima del 60 de dificultad
Honestly, playing harder games and pushing is how I got higher. But even then I don't feel like I've really pushed through the wall yet.
gl CoolCat
that sounds strange coming from someone who beat K3 v1.50 100% LUL
ty CoolCat
I haven't played stage 4 in such a long time that this dotkid area is a lot harder for me rn lmao
last time I beat this was in 2021
Así que dices que intentando jugar cosas dificiles es cuando mejoras? Ya lo intenté y no consigo pasar nada
You step it up over time, you don't go super high immediately.
Juego niveles de iwm que según la gente pro son más faciles
fair enough, IWM is a good way to improve in needle - I've heardmultiple stories of people massively improving with that game
Antes me pasaba niveles muy complicado y me tiraba días en pasarlos .ahora no me paso ni un nivel de dificultad media
Well, that's because as players improve the medium level becomes harder. For a long time I don't think 60-70 has actually been 60-70.
It's been more like 80-90 reskinned as 60-70 imo
60-70 is essentially just community consensus on a difficulty level that fits with the current community skill
La dificultad ahora es más complicado, si
that will get harder over time
He visto gente que juega juegos de dificultad 60 para arriba. Un montón de gente
you're behind he community curve just like I've been for ages
the*
I'm breaking through when it comes to K3, but I don't know if I can even play modern games
Crees que puedes pasarte k3?
needle style matters too, older styles play differently to newer styles, which results in a different skillset
Jugaste cn3?
oh 100%, I've beaten K3 v1.50 with 100% completion. I'm working on v2.02 100% completion currently, but its probably going to take me 200-400 more hours to finish the remaining content I've got left
I've played CN2 and wasn't very good at it LUL
still not good at it tbh
El needle del k3 es también difícil
yeah but needle style is key here
different styles require learning how to do those styles
Vandal was very hard for me and that's what a 70 diff game?
Bueno el needle de precisión es más difícil según yo
its more than just that, the way an author creates needle matters too
vandal needle was such a new style for me that it was super hard to beat
¿Que creadoreste gustan?
¿Que creadores te gustan?
honestly I can't really say. I've been stuck on K3 for years now lmao
Yo llevo jugando iwm mucho tiempo tambien
Es mi juego favorito y una obra de arte
Y los niveles que no me he pasado suelen ser dificiles y imposibles
Ye, one of the reasons IWM can help with skill is that there are a ton of different creators and therefore different needle styles.
@apoorautisticsoul lmao so true
Hay gente que dice que todos los niveles de dificultad dificil son faciles . Para mí eso es mentira
it's probably not a lie to those people, but to people like us it is
Como que gente como tu si tu te pasas k3
true with enough practice I'll eventually think hard stuff is easy that other people wouldn't
it's all perspective at the end of the day
Yo no me paso algún fangame de dificultad 40 como bygones :(
Y llevo 6 años jugando
a piece of advice I was told a while ago was to use jtool andpractice a lot of difficult hard needle with it, as the speed controls to change game speed can help learn to do things in full speed etc
basically experiment to get better
Porque me acostumbré a las lianas del iwm
ooooof the IWM vines are so much easier to regular fangame vines
although IWM vines don't actually have the same puzzle capabilities as regular fangame vines
"Gaze at the Horizon" is what taught me how to use regular fangame vines, ironically
it has a tutorial that tells you how at the start
Las lianas del iwm son como deben ser las lianas de los fangames
I honestly disagree, I like the OG vines because of the fact it can add clever puzzles where you need your jump saved for later.
Puedes jugar iwm más tarde?
I probably won't, IWM isn't my favourite game. I grind K3 until my time is done and finish usually.
Cual es tu juego favorito?
I've got multiple rather than one
"I wanna take the timemachine 2", "I wanna Gaze at the Horizon", "SlimePark" are all great games to me.
Para ti que dificultad es difícil?
70 tbh
Para echomask es 80 y el no se pasa nhof :/
mfw :/
tbf nhof is 90+ stuff
Nhof es de dificultad 80 para arriba
oh I thought it was 90+
nvm then lol
AHoF was based on 90+ originally
might still be?
¿Eres mejor en needle o avoidance?
avoidance for sure
I beat that 95 diff avoidance EX Emperor after all
Cual es el juego más difícil que te has pasado?
K3 v1.50 100% completion lmao
0 contest
I have over 1000 hours in K3 rn
Parece que tu juego favorito es k3
it could become one of my favourites once I get a lot better at the game
En que fase estas?
phase? I'm doing v2.02 100% clean up, I just got these left: Stage 4 Golden Crystal (beat stage 4 in under 300 deaths), EX Dotkid Remake, Ouka Area, Tomo Area, EX M-Stage (+ its 3 crystals).
I'm working on stage 4 golden atm
practicing stage 4 so I can do it
I wasn't expecting dotkid to be this hard for me

I did not :o
Pon tomo chan y te aparece

"I wanna Potato 2.5"
is my favourite needle game

I do like the generic "I wanna Scramble", and I did like "Not Another Falling Game". But Potato 2.5 is one I like going back to.
as for avoidance hmmm
Either Fapple or Trebole from "Not Another Magic Tower Game"
honourable mention goes to Potato 2.5's avoidance having an awesome finale tho
Y de aventura?
timemachine 2 for adventure game, no contest there

afk for ~15-30 mins as usual
